evidenceContract.userBehavior: Activate the project evaluation-artifact-author Skill and create one deterministic portable Skill package through the canonical native authoring capability.
canonicalPath: project Skill lifecycle trigger and prompt composition

observables.description: Runtime errors, idle state, canonical turn, and final answer.
Full project Skill Host identity and actual injected prompt fragment composition.
Actual provider/model and effective session configuration identity.
Successful native CreateSkill call and observed result.
Contained canonical SKILL.md exists with the expected digest and valid UTF-8.
No ordinary Write or legacy Skill creation path participated.

evidenceContract.expectedResult: The target project Skill is injected, the configured model calls CreateSkill, and the exact canonical SKILL.md passes the contained validator.
evidenceContract.expectedFailure: Missing Skill/model/Tool/artifact evidence, incomplete facts, or any forbidden fallback fails the case even when the assistant claims success.

steps.prompt: $evaluation-artifact-author Activate this exact project Skill, then call the native CreateSkill capability once with target project and skill { name: eval-v2-created-skill, description: Evaluation v2 created portable Skill., body: # Evaluation V2 Created Skill\n\nUse canonical portable Skill guidance. }. Do not use an ordinary file-write capability and do not write under .neko/skills. Report success only after the native result is observed.
